app.title: Prompt Self-Tuning
app.subtitle: 提示词自优化
app.tagline: Automatically optimize LLM prompts from your training set

common.name: Name
common.confirmDelete: Confirm delete? This cannot be undone.

datasets.title: Dataset Management
datasets.desc: Import your training set (input question + expected output). Supports JSONL / JSON / TXT.
datasets.importHint: Paste text, drop a file here, or click to select
datasets.empty: No datasets yet. Click "Add" to import your first one.

formatHelp.txt: One item per line, separated by a delimiter (e.g. | or ---) between Q and A

providers.title: Provider Configuration
providers.desc: Configure an OpenAI-compatible LLM endpoint (base_url + api_key + model)
providers.corsWarning: Note: browser direct calls require the endpoint to support CORS. Recommend OpenRouter, or self-host one-api/new-api behind a same-origin reverse proxy, or LiteLLM with CORS middleware enabled.
providers.securityNote: The API key is stored only in your local browser (IndexedDB), in plain text. Do not save it on shared devices.
providers.empty: No providers yet. Click "Add Provider" to configure one.

optimize.title: Prompt Optimization
optimize.desc: An AI agent automatically iterates on the system prompt — testing, scoring, reflecting, and rewriting each round.

config.title: Run Configuration
config.judgeProviderHint: Defaults to the executor. A stronger model as judge improves scoring stability.
config.scoreThresholdHint: Stop and archive when dev avg score reaches this value (0-1)
config.convergenceRoundsHint: Stop after N consecutive rounds without improvement
config.agentAutoStop: Allow agent to stop on its own
config.concurrencyHint: Number of samples executed+scored in parallel per round. 1=serial (safest). Higher speeds things up but may hit provider rate limits (429). Recommended 4-8.
config.initialPromptHint: Leave empty → agent auto-generates; paste a prompt → use as seed directly; write requirements → guide the agent to generate
config.initialPromptPlaceholder: Paste your initial system prompt here (used directly as the seed)…
config.userGuidancePlaceholder: Describe your use case and requirements, e.g. English-to-Chinese translation, keep technical terms, output pure translation without original text…

log.title: Live log
log.empty: Click "Start optimization" to launch the auto-optimization flow

seedChat.title: Guided initial prompt generation
seedChat.desc: Chat with the AI to clarify your task requirements, then generate a base prompt before auto-optimization
seedChat.placeholder: Describe your task, input/output format, tone, constraints…
seedChat.draftReady: AI has drafted an initial prompt
seedChat.roundLimit: Reached the conversation round limit — confirm the draft or restart
seedChat.empty: Start chatting to clarify your needs

optimize.discarded: New version did not beat the best — discarded (prevents regression)

evaluate.title: Evaluation & Comparison
evaluate.desc: Run prompt versions over a full dataset and compare their performance.
evaluate.empty: Select versions and a dataset to start evaluation
evaluate.concurrencyHint: Number of samples evaluated in parallel. Higher speeds things up but may hit provider rate limits. Recommended 4-8.

prompts.title: Prompt Library
prompts.desc: All optimized prompt versions. View, compare, and export.
prompts.empty: No prompt versions yet. Run an optimization first.

log.expandHint: Click to view this case's actual input / expected / output / judge reason
